ground_truth.description: Photo from streets of Melbourne. Tall buildings but no visible landmark. Specifically where La Trobe Street and Swanston Street meet.
ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo from the streets of Melbourne. Tall buildings but no visible landmark. More specifically where Trobe Street and Swanston Street meet. Daytime, clear skies.

details.description: A view up a steep, straight CBD street lined with high‑rise glass towers and older stone-clad buildings. Dual tram tracks run up the middle with dense overhead catenary wiring crossing the intersection in the foreground. There are cars in traffic and parked kerbside, tram safety barriers to the right, winter-bare street trees further up the street, and clear blue sky. Visible shopfront signs include a vertical “LEGO Certified Store” banner on the left, suggesting proximity to Melbourne Central. The perspective looks north up the street from an east–west cross street with tram wires overhead.

details.description: A daytime street scene in Melbourne's central business district. The viewpoint is from street level, looking uphill between tall modern glass office towers on the right and a mix of building facades on the left. In the center of the road run parallel tram tracks, with an intricate network of overhead electric wires crisscrossing the sky. Parked cars line the sides, and a retail sign for a LEGO Certified Store is visible on the left. The sky is clear blue, and the overall mood is a busy urban corridor with characteristic Melbourne tram infrastructure.

details.description: Urban street canyon in central Melbourne showing a multi‑lane roadway with embedded tram tracks and dense overhead tram wires. Tall glass and steel office towers line both sides, with shopfront signage on the left including a vertical 'LEGO Certified Store' sign and parking/garage signs associated with the Melbourne Central complex. Traffic, parked cars, traffic lights, and platform-style tram stop elements are visible. The street rises toward a crest in the distance under a clear blue sky, typical of Melbourne’s CBD grid.

details.description: A street-level view in Melbourne's central business district showing tram rails and overhead wires crossing the frame. Tall glass-clad office towers line both sides of the street, reflecting the blue sky. The road is populated with parked cars along the curb and a few moving vehicles, while tram tracks run down the center and disappear toward the distance. The scene is captured from a lower vantage point, accentuating the urban canyon created by the modern high-rises and the network of wires overhead typical of Melbourne's tram system.

details.description: A street-level view looking north along Swanston Street in Melbourne's Central Business District on a clear, sunny day. The perspective looks up a gentle slope towards the intersection with La Trobe Street. A dense network of tram overhead wires crisscrosses the blue sky above. On the left (west side), the facade of the Melbourne Central shopping centre is visible, adorned with vertical banners advertising a 'LEGO Certified Store' (yellow), 'TGI FRIDAYS' (red), and 'Walker's Doughnuts' (red and white circular logo). A blue 'CAR PARK' sign is also prominent on this side. On the right (east side), the QV Melbourne complex is visible, featuring a building with a cream-colored stone facade at the lower levels and a tall, modern blue glass residential tower (QV1 Apartments) rising behind it. Cars, including a white sedan, are driving north along the street. Construction barriers or hoardings line the sidewalk on the right.

details.description: A vertical eye-level shot looking west down La Trobe Street in Melbourne, Australia. The scene is dominated by a deep urban canyon formed by modern glass skyscrapers and commercial buildings. In the foreground on the left, a yellow 'LEGO Certified Store' banner and a red 'TGI FRIDAYS' banner are visible on the facade of the Melbourne Central shopping complex. Numerous overhead tram power lines crisscross the sky, and tram tracks run down the center of the asphalt road. The street features a notable incline in the distance. Several cars, including a white Toyota and a police van, are parked or moving along the street. The lighting suggests a clear day with bright sunlight reflecting off the glass facades of the buildings, particularly the tall blue-tinted skyscraper on the right.

details.description: A long, straight central-city street with dual tram tracks and dense overhead catenary wiring stretches uphill through a canyon of high‑rise towers and mid‑rise heritage facades. Modern blue-glass curtain‑wall skyscrapers line both sides, contrasted by a light-coloured early 20th‑century commercial building on the right. Traffic, parking signage, and retail signage (including a vertical banner for a LEGO Certified Store) are visible at street level. The scene strongly suggests a Melbourne CBD tram corridor, photographed from a major cross‑junction where multiple tram wires intersect.

details.description: A city street scene in daytime with a dense canopy of overhead tram wires crossing between tall buildings. The avenue is flanked by modern blue glass office towers on both sides and a pale neoclassical white building with columns on the right. A LEGO Certified Store sign is visible on the left among storefronts; cars are parked along the curb. Two tram rails run down the center of the street, suggesting a streetcar line, while other urban elements such as signage and wire conduits form a web overhead. The perspective appears to look uphill along a broad avenue with a mix of contemporary and historic architectural styles and a clear blue sky above.

details.description: Urban street scene in a dense central business district with a long, rising roadway lined by modern glass skyscrapers and a few older stone-clad buildings. Twin tram tracks run up the middle of the street beneath a dense web of overhead tram wires. Traffic, parked cars, shopfront signs (including a vertical ‘LEGO Certified Store’ sign), and winter-bare street trees appear along the corridor. The view looks up the hill toward a distant crest under a clear blue sky, typical of a Melbourne CBD tram corridor.

details.description: A urban street scene captured from the sidewalk looking up a sloped avenue. The street is flanked by tall modern glass buildings with blue-tinted façades on both sides. Centered down the middle are tram tracks, with overhead power lines and multiple wires crisscrossing the sky above. Cars are parked along the curbs and several vehicles move along the street. On the left, storefront signage is visible, including a LEGO store sign. The weather is clear with a bright blue sky, and leafless trees line the avenue in the distance.

details.description: A street-level urban landscape looking west down La Trobe Street in Melbourne's Central Business District. The view is framed by tall skyscrapers creating a canyon effect, with the road dipping down towards the intersection with Elizabeth Street and rising again in the distance. On the left (south side), the modern glass facade of the Melbourne Central shopping complex is visible, featuring vertical banners for a "LEGO Certified Store" and "TGI FRIDAYS". On the right (north side), a mix of architecture includes a tall blue glass skyscraper and the historic cream-colored Argus Building with its distinctive corner tower. The sky is a clear blue, and the street is lined with tram tracks and a complex web of overhead wires. Traffic, including a white sedan and van, moves along the road.

details.description: A street-level view looking west down La Trobe Street in Melbourne, Australia. The scene is dominated by a steep hill in the distance and a dense network of overhead tram wires. On the left side of the street is the Melbourne Central shopping complex, identifiable by a yellow 'LEGO Certified Store' banner and a red 'TGI FRIDAYS' sign. On the right side stands the Aurora Melbourne Central skyscraper, a tall modern building with a blue glass facade and vertical architectural fins. The street features multiple lanes of traffic, tram tracks running down the center, and various parked vehicles, including a white car with a Victorian license plate. The lighting suggests a clear day with the sun positioned to create long shadows, likely in the morning or late afternoon.
